description: Bounded thematic AOI workflow for one selected source thinker. Reconstructs the source thinker's themes, maps the subject author's engagement, identifies flat AOI findings with provenance, and closes with a structured thematic report.

phases.phase_description: Reconstruct the major themes, claims, commitments, and source-document inventory for the selected source thinker corpus.
phases.base_phase_description: Build a thematic synthesis of the selected source thinker corpus with stable theme IDs and explicit source-document inventory.

phases.phase_description: Map how the subject corpus engages, partially engages, ignores, or distorts each source theme.
phases.base_phase_description: Produce a theme-keyed engagement map for the subject corpus using the source thematic synthesis as context.

phases.phase_description: Identify flat AOI findings with theme linkage, sin type, severity, and target/source provenance.
phases.base_phase_description: Generate flat AOI findings keyed by theme_id and sin_type, with explicit provenance and consequence analysis.

phases.phase_description: Close the bounded AOI loop with a structured report over the themes, engagement pattern, and AOI findings.
phases.base_phase_description: Produce a structured thematic AOI report suitable for presentation and inspection.

output_description: Single-thinker AOI thematic analysis with explicit source-document inventory, theme-keyed engagement mapping, flat AOI findings, and a structured thematic report.
planner_strategy: This bounded AOI workflow assumes exactly one selected source thinker. Keep the selected source thinker fixed across the whole workflow. Recommend the parent AOI thematic analysis surface first; the child AOI views are auto-included by the presenter. Do not broaden this workflow into thinker discovery or multi-thinker comparison.
